_note: Content requirements per script_gag_lock_id, read by cb_seedance._gag_locks(). TWO consumers share this schema: (1) the kept legacy compact-JSON authoring path (_build_shots' reveal/misread shot construction, and the 'SCRIPT LOCKS' summary text) reads required_visual_payoff/timing_lock/character_misread/reaction_line as PLAIN REQUIRED KEYS (KeyError if absent) plus carry_visual/acting_note/reveal_target_time/forbidden_interpretations as optional; (2) validate_seedance_prompt/validate_compact_prompt (T33 Ruling) read required_words (substrings the shipped prompt MUST contain, case-insensitive) and prohibited_patterns (regexes it must NOT match) — a beat whose gag drifts off either fails the render, not silently. An entry missing the first group crashes any beat referencing it; always fill in both groups.
